plugins.name: GitHub Issues
plugins.description: Browse open GitHub issues across your repos (via the gh CLI) or one repo in a searchable, sortable dialog with a repository filter; click one to drop a prompt asking the agent to open and review it. The prompt template is editable in settings.
plugins.author: Cockpit

versions.notes: gh CLI + cross-repo, searchable/sortable dialog with a repository filter (All + per-repo), per-field settings help tooltips.

plugins.name: System Monitor
plugins.description: CPU, memory and disk usage for a Dashboard workspace. You pick which of the three in its settings, so two of them side by side can each watch something different.
plugins.author: Cockpit

versions.notes: Initial release — CPU, memory and disk on a dashboard, each of the three toggleable per placed instance. Needs a cockpit build with the widget contribution point (AddWidget).

templates.name: Ticket → branch → agent
templates.description: When you pick a ticket for a session: cut its branch, move the ticket to in progress, and put the agent to work on it.
templates.author: Cockpit
